goal: Reduce runtime surface area around the personal modnet agent. Remove stale or redundant code in src/agent and connected script tooling without weakening the core loop, local-model support, or self-improvement path.

Tighten the autonomous improvement loop so it evaluates bounded runtime changes instead of module-generation prompts. Keep the loop simple, deterministic first, and aligned with self-improvement for a personal node.
Remove or simplify improvement code that does not directly support bounded runtime experiments, self-distillation, or model-training preparation. Prefer deletion to archival where safe.
